Title: Customer can view order history
Description: As a customer I want to view my order history so I can track past purchases, returns, and refunds.

Title: Design order history API schema
Description: Draft and review the API schema for order history endpoints.

Title: Implement order history UI component
Description: Build the React component for displaying order history.

Title: Order dates display in wrong timezone
Description: Order timestamps shown in UTC instead of the customer local timezone.

Title: Customer can filter order history by date, region, and status
Description: Add multi-field filter controls to the order history view.

Title: Support multiple payment methods
Description: Enable customers to save and use multiple payment methods across checkout flows.

Title: Customer can add credit card
Description: Implement the credit card add flow with PCI compliance, including tokenization and 3DS verification.

Title: Payment confirmation email not sent on retry
Description: When a payment retry succeeds the confirmation email is missing.

Title: Integrate with payment provider sandbox
Description: Wire up the payment provider sandbox for end-to-end testing.

Title: Monthly revenue dashboard for finance team
Description: Finance team needs a dashboard showing monthly revenue trends by product line.

Title: Build revenue aggregation query
Description: Write SQL for monthly revenue rollup with product line breakdowns.

Title: Design dashboard chart components
Description: Create reusable chart components using the design system.

Title: Sync customer data from CRM
Description: Nightly sync of customer data from the CRM into the platform database.

Title: Configure CRM OAuth flow
Description: Set up OAuth 2.0 flow for the CRM API.

Title: CRM sync fails for customers with special characters in name
Description: Unicode characters in customer names cause sync errors.

Title: Upgrade Node.js runtime to v22
Description: Upgrade the production Node.js runtime from v20 to v22.

Title: Enable automated database backups
Description: Configure nightly automated backups for the production database.
